mapper.insert: insert ignore into announcement_read (announcement_id, user_id, read_time) values (#{announcementId}, #{userId}, now())

insert ignore into announcement_read (announcement_id, user_id, read_time) select a.id, #{userId}, now() from announcement a where a.deleted = 0 and a.publish_status = '1' and a.publish_time is not null and a.publish_time <= now() and (a.expire_time is null or a.expire_time > now()) and ( a.scope_type = 'all' or ( a.scope_type = 'assign' and a.scope_payload is not null and json_contains(a.scope_payload, cast(#{userId} as json), '$') ) )
